summary: Publica API - Failed calls at stream start do not result in a video error - Live game
description: GIVEN an International user is logged in

steps.action:
WHEN network calls to "[pbs.getpublica.com|http://pbs.getpublica.com]" are blocked 
OR network calls to "[pbs.getpublica.com|http://pbs.getpublica.com]" are failing
AND the user selects a Live in-progress game for playback
AND an ad break occurs
steps.result:
THEN the stream continues to playback with no video error modal popping up
AND ads playback during the ad break
